<USER_REQUEST>
You need to create 3 CBSE Class 12 CHEMISTRY prediction papers for the 2027 board exam.

STEPS:
1. First, READ the latest SQP to understand the exact format:
   - Read file: D:\Study Papers\Jeffrey\Chemistry\SQP 2025-26\Chemistry-SQP.pdf
   - Read file: D:\Study Papers\Jeffrey\Chemistry\SQP 2025-26\Chemistry-MS.pdf
   - Also read 1-2 recent actual papers:
   - Read file: D:\Study Papers\Jeffrey\Chemistry\2026\56-1-1_Chemistry.pdf
   - Read file: D:\Study Papers\Jeffrey\Chemistry\2025\56-1-1_Chemistry.pdf

2. ANALYZE patterns:
   - Section structure and marks distribution
   - Which chapters appear most (Solutions, Electrochemistry, Chemical Kinetics, d-block, Coordination Compounds, Organic reactions, Polymers, Biomolecules)
   - Internal choice patterns
   - Types of numerical/reasoning questions

3. CREATE 3 different prediction papers. Save them as:
   - D:\Study Papers\Jeffrey\Chemistry\Prediction Papers\Chemistry_Prediction_Paper_1.md
   - D:\Study Papers\Jeffrey\Chemistry\Prediction Papers\Chemistry_Prediction_Paper_2.md
   - D:\Study Papers\Jeffrey\Chemistry\Prediction Papers\Chemistry_Prediction_Paper_3.md

Each paper must:
- Follow the EXACT CBSE format from the SQP
- Have COMPLETE questions with chemical equations, reactions, structures where needed
- Cover different chapter combinations across the 3 papers
- Include proper internal choice (OR) questions
- Include case-study based questions
- Have the standard CBSE header
- Be realistic for actual exam practice
</USER_REQUEST>
